_note: Metadata-only slice of the OpenTabs jira plugin, vendored hermetically at SHA 4b17021637d2cac12b8d84d21c40e765aa7b85e9 (see vendor/opentabs-snapshot/PIN.md). Wall 1: NO dist/, NO handle() runtime is executed -- the importer (scripts/import-opentabs-catalog.mjs) reads ONLY .name/.description/.input/.group/.summary metadata. The opentabs.urlPatterns below is the AUTHORITATIVE upstream value (*://*.atlassian.net/* -> service atlassian.net). NOTE: jira AND confluence both host on *.atlassian.net; the importer canonicalizes the slug STEM from the vendored DIR NAME via STEM_OVERRIDES ({jira:'jira', confluence:'confluence', ...}), NOT from the shared host, so jira emits DISTINCT opentabs__jira__* slugs (never colliding with confluence). defineTool/OpenTabsPlugin and the api/apiVoid transport helpers are resolved from local stubs (sdk-stub.ts, jira-api.ts) so the importer's import() never drags the real SDK's DOM/fetch surface into node.
name: @opentabs-dev/opentabs-plugin-jira
